item.title: Mexican Cartel Hacked FBI Agent's Phone to Hunt Down Informants
item.author: Seytonic
item.content:encoded:
0:00 Intro 0:17 Cartel Hacked FBI Agent's Phone to Hunt Down Informants 2:35 Russia Drops New Phishing Technique 5:16 Leaking Military Secrets to China 8:27 Tech Support Scammers Have a New Trick!
https://oig.justice.gov/sites/default/files/reports/25-065_t.pdf
https://cloud.google.com/blog/topics/threat-intelligence/creative-phishing-academics-critics-of-russia https://citizenlab.ca/2025/06/russian-government-linked-social-engineering-targets-app-specific-passwords/
https://www.army.mil/article/286526/former_jblm_soldier_pleads_guilty_to_attempting_to_share_military_secrets_with_china https://www.justice.gov/archives/opa/file/1318376/dl?inline https://www.justice.gov/archives/opa/file/1318381/dl?inline
https://www.malwarebytes.com/blog/news/2025/06/scammers-hijack-websites-of-bank-of-america-netflix-microsoft-and-more-to-insert-fake-phone-number =============================================== My Website: https://www.seytonic.com/ Follow me on TWTR: https://twitter.com/seytonic Follow me on INSTA: https://www.instagram.com/jhonti/ ===============================================

item.title: They Hired Me to Steal a Shopping Cart Full of Human DNA 🧬 Darknet Diaries Ep. 160: Greg
item.author: Jack Rhysider
item.content:encoded:
Greg Linares (AKA Laughing Mantis) shares his hunts for Zero Day exploits, the triple(?) agent working at Microsoft, how he became the youngest hacker ever arrested in Arizona, and that time a client hired him to steal human DNA.
Follow Greg on Twitter: https://x.com/Laughing_Mantis.
Visit https://darknetdiaries.com/episode/160 for a list of sources, full transcripts, and to listen to all episodes.
